Subject: Invoice PDF attachment opens as blank page
Description: Customer reports invoice attachment is blank when opened from monthly billing email.
Notes:
Customer attached screenshot from Acrobat.

Workaround: download from portal instead of email link.

Subject: SSO loop after password reset
Description: User bounced between IdP and app after forced password reset.
Notes:
Error seen: redirect_uri_mismatch

  • Cleared stale relay state
  • Reset app session

Subject: Webhook retries created duplicate shipment events
Description: Downstream ERP received same shipment event three times after timeout.
Notes:
Observed three retries within 90 seconds.

Root cause candidate: 504 from customer endpoint.

Subject: VAT total looks doubled on credit note
Description: Customer says tax amount is duplicated on PDF credit note, but line items look correct.
Notes:
Requester email missing from export after CRM sync.

Legacy account

Subject: Browser warning when downloading CSV report
Description: Customer saw mixed-content warning in older browser when downloading analytics report.
Notes:
Could not reproduce in Chrome 122.

User was on IE mode.

Subject: Attachments fail with 413 Request Entity Too Large
Description: Inbound email parser rejected ticket attachments over 20MB.
Notes:
Customer sent 26.4MB TIFF scan.

Suggested PDF compression.

Subject: Card payment page shows spinner forever
Description: Customer could not complete payment; spinner never cleared after 3DS step.
Notes:
Payment gateway callback timed out.

Status manually reconciled.

Subject: Knowledge search surfaced deleted draft article
Description: Agent found and shared draft article that should not have been searchable.
Notes:
ACL cache did not evict after article deletion.

Potential data governance issue.

Subject: Legacy export job timed out at 50k rows
Description: Scheduled nightly export failed and customer received partial file.
Notes:
Timeout hit at 00:05:00 exactly.

Job restarted manually with narrower date range.

Subject: UTF-8 characters corrupted in webhook payload
Description: Partner received replacement characters for accented names in JSON body.
Notes: Legacy connector forced ISO-8859-1 encode path.

Subject: SCIM deprovision left user active in app
Description: Disabled employee still had access after IdP deprovision event.
Notes: SCIM PATCH missing active:false due to mapper bug.

Subject: Case attachments downloaded with wrong filename
Description: Downloaded files all named attachment.bin instead of original filename.
Notes: Issue isolated to Safari 17 only.

Subject: Credit card expiry update saved but old card was charged
Description: Customer updated card before renewal, but previous card was still charged.
Notes: Payment profile cache TTL exceeded renewal cutoff.

Description: Multiple users reported 502 on portal landing page in UK shard.
Notes: Nginx upstream pointed at drained node after deploy.
